$comment: Curated known-good hashes for issued attribute credentials. Each entry binds an attribute key to the canonical hash of the issued credential payload. In a real system these would be derived from BBS+ signed credentials issued by a compliance provider. For the demo, the hashes are the sha256 of the canonical payload returned by `attributeCanonicalPayload(key)` in src/attestation/attribute.ts — so the attribute fixture is deterministic across machines.
